3c43a25b0aba8fb8713dd8254bc9ce1fc4060c32.message:
feat(admin): add Aptos (APT) to all hot wallet admin views

- Gas Wallet Activity live balances grid now shows the Aptos hot wallet
  with APT balance from Redis cache
